svg.title: Annotated horizontal end-to-end paper tree seed 0
svg.desc: Horizontal 45-node cultural paper tree for seed 0, with each node annotated by the change made.
svg.text: Horizontal view of runs/cultural_paper_tree_seed0: each node includes the operator, score, and concrete change made.
Dashed gray edges connect same-agent parents; colored edges show explicit cultural source transfer.
